unified_frame_statement: Coach Elena shares her origin story, showing how discovering holistic health after personal crisis helped her transform from burned-out executive to holistic wellness guide for hundreds.

state_alpha.internal_monologue: "Success was supposed to feel better than this."
state_alpha.sensory_anchor: The fluorescent buzz of the corner office at midnight

the_abyss.realization: "My body was screaming what my mind refused to hear."

the_spark.insight_quote: "She said 'Your body isn't broken, it's speaking.' Everything clicked." (11:20)

sensory_anchors: The sterile hospital sheets during the collapse
The warmth during first holistic session
The energy she feels guiding clients now
